title_en: PhD Student · SJTU School of Medicine · AI4Rad Lab
title_cn: 博士研究生 · 交大医学院 · AI4Rad Lab
bio_en: PhD student at SJTU School of Medicine and a member of AI4Rad Lab. Research focuses on clinical radiology and medical imaging AI.
bio_cn: 交大医学院博士研究生，AI4Rad Lab 成员。研究方向为临床放射学与医学影像人工智能。

news_en.text: LumbarSR — a paired clinical CT & micro-CT dataset for lumbar vertebra super-resolution — accepted by Scientific Data (IF 7.2).

news_cn.text: LumbarSR —— 配对临床 CT 与显微 CT 的腰椎超分辨率数据集，被 Scientific Data 接收（IF 7.2）。
